description: Create comprehensive test suite for theory leverage (20+ tests) following the pattern in tests/test_anomaly_leverage.py
steps: Step 1 - Create tests/test_theory_leverage.py with proper imports from all modified modules

Step 2 - Add helper functions: _make_theory() that creates a LocalTheoryObject with scope, predictive_claims, concept_refs. _make_task() and _make_blackboard() and _make_memory_pack() following test_anomaly_leverage.py pattern

Step 3 - Add TestGetTheoryPredictionForTask class (4+ tests): test prediction when claims match task text, test no prediction when claims dont match, test confidence reflects theory.confidence_score, test relevant_claims are populated

Step 4 - Add TestUpdateTheoryPredictiveValue class (4+ tests): test initial update with correct prediction, test initial update with incorrect prediction, test Laplace smoothing formula (correct_predictions+1)/(prediction_count+2), test multiple updates converge correctly

Step 5 - Add TestCheckTheoryExplainsContradiction class (3+ tests): test returns True when claims overlap contradiction content, test returns False when no overlap, test explanatory_power increases on True

Step 6 - Add TestVerifyOutputTheoryGuided class (4+ tests): test normal pass when theory predicts no failure, test stricter check when theory predicts failure (single marker fails), test passes strict check with multiple markers, test predicts_difficulty requires secondary marker

Step 7 - Add TestSelectApplicableConceptsTheoryGuided class (3+ tests): test theory-aligned concepts get score boost, test near-threshold concepts admitted when in theory.concept_refs, test non-aligned concepts unchanged

Step 8 - Add TestChooseTierTheoryGuided class (3+ tests): test prevents tier_0 when predicts_difficulty, test forces tier_2 when predicts_failure with high confidence, test no change when prediction is benign

Step 9 - Add TestPipelineTheoryLeverage class (4+ tests): test pipeline with use_theory_leverage=False returns same keys as before, test pipeline with use_theory_leverage=True runs without errors and returns theory keys, test pipeline with use_theory_leverage=True and seeded theories produces predictions, test pipeline with BOTH use_theory_leverage=True and use_anomaly_leverage=True works
acceptance_criteria: All new tests pass: pytest tests/test_theory_leverage.py -q
All 88 existing tests still pass: pytest tests/ -q

Tests cover all 6 new functions: verify_output_theory_guided, select_applicable_concepts_theory_guided, choose_tier_theory_guided, get_theory_prediction_for_task, update_theory_predictive_value, check_theory_explains_contradiction
Tests verify pipeline integration with use_theory_leverage=True/False
Tests are meaningful - they would fail if the implementation were reverted
verification: Run: ~/.pyenv/versions/3.12.13/bin/python -m pytest tests/ --tb=short -q - all tests (88 existing + new) pass
findings: 38 test methods created covering all 6 functions plus pipeline integration. All 126 tests pass (88 existing + 38 new). Key finding: check_theory_explains_contradiction requires >= 2 token overlap between theory claims and contradiction content - test data must share at least 2 meaningful words. The tokenizer strips punctuation and lowercases.
